nasb.text: As she was going to get it, he called to her and said, “Please bring me a piece of bread in your hand.”

esv.text: And as she was going to bring it, he called to her and said, “Bring me a morsel of bread in your hand.”

cnv.text: 她去取水的時候，以利亞又叫她，說：“請你也給我拿點餅來！”

ccb.text: 那妇人去拿水的时候，以利亚又说：“请给我拿一点饼。”
